blocks: Safety & Compliance fully N/A without PX override
restricted comments included in broad summary

ratingBandThresholds.label: Exceptional
ratingBandThresholds.meaning: Strong candidate for future similar work; still requires project-specific risk review.

ratingBandThresholds.label: Above Average
ratingBandThresholds.meaning: Generally strong performer with limited controls or monitoring.

ratingBandThresholds.label: Satisfactory
ratingBandThresholds.meaning: Acceptable performance; normal procurement and project controls apply.

ratingBandThresholds.label: Below Average
ratingBandThresholds.meaning: Use caution; future award requires PM/PX/procurement review and defined controls.

ratingBandThresholds.label: Unsatisfactory
ratingBandThresholds.meaning: Not recommended for similar scope without executive/procurement review and documented risk-control plan.

ratingBandThresholds.label: Insufficient Data
ratingBandThresholds.meaning: Not enough reliable project evidence to publish a score.
